description_long: This is a two-story yellow house with a prominent dark gray gable roof and a single chimney. The front facade features a covered entryway with a small porch supported by two white columns, and a set of steps leading up to the main door. The house has multiple white-framed windows arranged in symmetrical rows on all sides, with flower boxes beneath several of them. The exterior walls are smooth and painted a soft yellow, contrasting with the white trim and gray roof. The landscaping includes low green hedges or bushes along the base of the house, adding a touch of greenery. The overall design is simple and functional, with a classic suburban residential appearance.
description: A two-story yellow house with a dark gray gable roof, white trim, a covered front porch, and symmetrical white-framed windows with flower boxes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, two stories of windows, and flower boxes beneath the lower windows.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long facade with multiple symmetrically arranged windows and a continuous row of flower boxes.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a simpler facade with fewer windows and a visible chimney, plus flower boxes along the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side windows, the edge of the porch, and the main roof structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, two white columns, and a simple overhang above the main door
